description: You are a marine robotics engineer preparing a simulation of an Autonomous Surface Vehicle (ASV) used for bathymetric mapping. Configure the environment and robot by setting the 'Fluid' node name to "seawater" and density to 1025. Update the 'ASV_BATHYMETRY' robot to include ImmersionProperties with a fluidName of "seawater" and a viscousResistanceForceCoefficient of 150. Adjust the robot's Physics centerOfMass to [0 0 -0.15]. Install a DistanceSensor named "depth_sonar" with the type "sonar" and a maxRange of 50. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/asv_configured.wbt.
